journal_entry.description: Conversion of 50 preferred shares to 25 common shares
journal_entry.rationale: This is an equity conversion transaction. Under IFRS, when preferred shares are converted to common shares, we debit (decrease) the Preferred Shares account for the carrying value being eliminated and credit (increase) the Common Shares account for the same amount. The carrying value of $100 is transferred from one equity class to another. No gain or loss is recognized on conversion of one equity instrument to another within the same entity. The transaction is a reclassification within equity, not a revenue-generating event, so no tax applies.

output.reason: Conversion of preferred shares to common shares: Debit Preferred Share Capital (equity decrease) to remove the carrying value of the converted preferred shares. This is a reclassification within equity - the preferred shares are eliminated and common shares are issued in their place.

debit_classifier.reason: Conversion of preferred shares to common shares: Debit Preferred Share Capital (equity decrease) to remove the carrying value of the converted preferred shares. This is a reclassification within equity - the preferred shares are eliminated and common shares are issued in their place.

output.reason: This is a share conversion transaction. On the credit side: (1) Preferred shares equity account decreases by $100 (equity decrease = credit to equity contra or debit, but we're removing preferred shares so we credit the preferred shares account to reduce it = equity decrease), which is actually a debit. Let me reconsider: When converting preferred to common, we need to remove the preferred shares (debit Preferred Shares) and add common shares (credit Common Shares). On the CREDIT side: we are increasing Common Shares equity = equity increase (1 line).

Let me reconsider: When converting preferred to common, we need to remove the preferred shares (debit Preferred Shares) and add common shares (credit Common Shares). On the CREDIT side: we are increasing Common Shares equity = equity increase (1 line).
